templateVariables.description: Variable mapping for Staff Itinerary template. Use this to replace {{variable}} placeholders when creating documents from form submissions.

eventDate.description: Event date formatted as 'Day Date Month Year'

mpcPhone.description: MPC's phone number with country code

guestTables.description: Number of tables needed (guestCount / 10, rounded up)

reservedTablesInfo.description: Information about reserved tables and their distribution
reservedTablesInfo.example:
Reserved tables
	2 round tables on LHS of stage – Grooms Side
	2 round tables on RHS of stage – Brides Side
reservedTablesInfo.logic: Build from page3.reserved-seatings and segregation info

extraTablesInfo.example:
Extra tables
	6ft table for gifts – Envelope box on this table
	CCLG & Favours

headTableInfo.example:
Head table - YES
	2 seater on RHS of stage
headTableInfo.note: Include position (RHS/LHS) if segregation is enabled

cakeTableInfo.example:
Cake table - YES
	On LHS side of stage
fields: page5.wedding-cake OR page5-new has cake info

decorInfo.description: Décor details (usually standard unless third party)
decorInfo.example:
Decor -
	Stage: Standard
	Centrepieces: Standard
	Walkway: Standard

inHouseServices.description: List of in-house services as table rows
inHouseServices.example:
| Welcome drinks | Mango & Guava |
| 360 | In front of Bar – After Food |
| White Walkway |  |
fields: Derived from various service selections across forms
page5-new services like special-effects, sweet-setups, photobooth

externalVendors.example:
|  | Photography | VIP Media Group - 07974722722 | Confirmed |
|  | Caterer | MKB - 0121 753 0816 |  |
externalVendors.format: Each vendor as: | ETA | Service | Company - Phone | Notes |

missingFields: ETA (Estimated Time of Arrival) for vendors - Not collected in form
AH Staff names - Not in form, manual entry needed
Caterer details - Not in current form

constructionLogic.reservedTablesInfo: Calculate table distribution based on segregation and reserved count
constructionLogic.extraTablesInfo: Combine all additional table selections into formatted list
constructionLogic.decorInfo: Use 'Standard' for each category unless custom decor company provided
constructionLogic.inHouseServices: Filter selected services and format as table rows
constructionLogic.externalVendors: Collect all external vendor details from photographer, videographer, DJ, cake, decor, special effects sections
